# @alternative-design-and-media/quick-api-connector (llms-full)

Machine-readable reference for AI assistants.

## Package

- Name: `@alternative-design-and-media/quick-api-connector`
- Runtime: native `fetch` (Node.js 18+ and edge runtimes)
- OpenAPI source: `api.json`

## Main exports

- `createQuickClient(config: QuickClientConfig): QuickClient`
- `createQuickApiClient(config: QuickClientConfig): QuickClient`
- `QuickClient`
- `QuickApiError`
- Shared domain types from `src/types/index.ts`

## QuickClientConfig

```ts
type QuickClientConfig =
  | { apiToken: string; companyId?: string; baseUrl?: string; fetchFn?: typeof fetch }
  | { bearerToken: string; companyId: string; baseUrl?: string; fetchFn?: typeof fetch };
```

## Exported method signatures

```ts
listExpensesV1(params?: ListExpensesV1Params)
listExpensesV2(params?: ListExpensesV2Params)
getExpenseV1(expenseId: number, fields?: ExpenseV1Fields[])
getExpenseV2(expenseId: number, fields?: ExpenseV2Fields[])
updateExpenseV2(expenseId: number, body: UpdateExpenseV2Body)
searchExpenseArtifact(body: SearchExpenseArtifactBody)
createExpenses(body: CreateExpensesBody)
bulkAcceptQuarantine(ids: number[])
bulkApproveExpenses(ids: number[])
bulkUnapproveExpenses(ids: number[])
bulkCheckExpenses(ids: number[])
bulkUncheckExpenses(ids: number[])
bulkExportExpenses(ids: number[])

listIncomes(params?: ListIncomesParams)
getIncome(incomeId: number, fields?: IncomeFields[])

getExpenseArtifacts(ids: number[])
getIncomeArtifacts(ids: number[])

listDocuments(params?: ListDocumentsParams)
listDocumentFiles(params?: ListDocumentFilesParams)
listDocumentTypes()
getDocument(documentId: number)
updateDocument(documentId: number, body: BodyFor<'/2/documents/update/{document_id}', 'post'>)
createDocuments(body: BodyFor<'/2/documents/create', 'post'>)
deleteDocuments(body: BodyFor<'/2/documents/delete', 'post'>)
attachDocuments(body: BodyFor<'/1/documents/attach', 'post'>)
detachDocuments(body: BodyFor<'/1/documents/detach', 'post'>)
searchDocument(body: BodyFor<'/2/documents/search', 'post'>)

listLedgerNumbers()
createLedgerNumbers(body: BodyFor<'/2/accounting/ledger-numbers/create', 'post'>)
updateLedgerNumber(ledgerNumberId: number, body: BodyFor<'/2/accounting/ledger-numbers/update/{ledger_number_id}', 'post'>)
deleteLedgerNumbers(ids: number[])
listVatCategories()
createVatCategories(body: BodyFor<'/2/accounting/vat-categories/create', 'post'>)
updateVatCategory(companyVatCategoryId: number, body: BodyFor<'/2/accounting/vat-categories/update/{company_vat_category_id}', 'post'>)
deleteVatCategories(ids: number[])

listCompanies()
getUserProfile()

listTaxCodes(params?: QueryFor<'/1/tax-codes', 'get'>)
listMonthlyTaxesV1(params?: QueryFor<'/1/monthly-taxes', 'get'>)
listMonthlyTaxesV2(params?: QueryFor<'/2/monthly-taxes', 'get'>)
createTaxesV1(body: BodyFor<'/1/taxes/create', 'post'>)
createTaxesV2(body: BodyFor<'/2/taxes/create', 'post'>)
updateTaxesV1(body: BodyFor<'/1/taxes/update', 'post'>)
updateTaxesV2(body: BodyFor<'/2/taxes/update', 'post'>)
deleteTaxesV1(ids: number[])
deleteTaxesV2(ids: number[])

listMonthlySalariesV1(params?: QueryFor<'/1/monthly-salaries', 'get'>)
listMonthlySalariesV2(params?: QueryFor<'/2/monthly-salaries', 'get'>)
createSalariesV1(body: BodyFor<'/1/salaries/create', 'post'>)
createSalariesV2(body: BodyFor<'/2/salaries/create', 'post'>)
updateSalariesV1(body: BodyFor<'/1/salaries/update', 'post'>)
updateSalariesV2(body: BodyFor<'/2/salaries/update', 'post'>)
deleteSalariesV1(ids: number[])
deleteSalariesV2(ids: number[])

listTags(params?: QueryFor<'/2/tags', 'get'>)
createTags(body: BodyFor<'/2/tags/create', 'post'>)
updateTags(body: BodyFor<'/2/tags/update', 'patch'>)
deleteTags(ids: number[])

listPartners(params?: QueryFor<'/1/partners', 'get'>)
listAccounts(params?: QueryFor<'/1/accounts', 'get'>)
listPayments(params?: QueryFor<'/1/payments', 'get'>)
pulse(params?: QueryFor<'/1/pulse', 'get'>)
uploadAuditXml(body: BodyFor<'/2/audit-xml', 'post'>)
getCompanyInfo(params?: QueryFor<'/2/company-info', 'get'>)
updateCompanyInfo(companyId: number, body: BodyFor<'/2/company-info/update/{company_id}', 'patch'>)
```

## Notes

- API token mode sends `Authorization: Token <apiToken>`
- OAuth mode sends `Authorization: Bearer <bearerToken>` and enforces `companyId`
- OAuth-only methods: `listCompanies`, `getUserProfile`
- Errors throw `QuickApiError` with `status` and parsed `body`
